acceptance_targets: [ch15-craft-001] PASS if the revised text at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:27 either matches the established combination or explicitly explains why a different sequence is required before the safe opens; FAIL if the mismatch remains unexplained.

[ch15-craft-002] PASS if the revised span between snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:79 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:81 contains a dramatized moment where chain integrity is actively threatened and recovered in-scene; FAIL if it remains a blanket summary of work completed.

[ch15-booker-001] PASS if a first-time reader can point to explicit text in snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:125-133 that makes line 125 provisional and line 235 final under materially changed pressure; FAIL if both beats still read as the same decision repeated.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised text at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:27 either matches the established combination or explicitly explains why a different sequence is required before the safe opens; FAIL if the mismatch remains unexplained.
findings.problem: Continuity break: the safe is opened with a different combination than the one established at the end of chapter 14, creating a canonical contradiction in a causally critical handoff beat.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:27, reconcile the dial sequence with the established prior-chapter combination. If the number change is intentional, add explicit on-page explanation between snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:5 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:27 before the safe opens.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised span between snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:79 and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:81 contains a dramatized moment where chain integrity is actively threatened and recovered in-scene; FAIL if it remains a blanket summary of work completed.
findings.problem: Sanitization drift via summary: a two-hour, high-risk evidence capture is compressed into a single retrospective paragraph, replacing lived scene pressure with procedural recap at the precise point where legal and personal stakes should stay embodied.
findings.rewrite_direction: Replace or expand snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:79 with an on-page micro-sequence that includes one concrete interruption risk, one chain-of-custody vulnerability, and one immediate bodily stress marker from Lena before returning to forward motion at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:81.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if a first-time reader can point to explicit text in snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:125-133 that makes line 125 provisional and line 235 final under materially changed pressure; FAIL if both beats still read as the same decision repeated.
findings.problem: Decision causality is partially duplicated: Lena appears to decide full unredacted release at line 125, then the chapter replays the same decisive beat at line 235 without a fully explicit procedural gate, softening climax efficiency.
findings.rewrite_direction: Tighten causal clarity by making the provisional-vs-final distinction explicit at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:125-133, then escalate new stakes (not just repeated stakes) before the final authorization at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:231-236.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Prioritize structural and craft blockers first: causality, chapter architecture, stakes clarity, continuity logic, and all HIGH/CRITICAL defects.
revision_pass.label: HIGH/CRITICAL structural/craft fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: When edge cases arise, choose the version that preserves uncomfortable specificity and character accountability; do not replace difficult scenes with procedural summary, and do not mute class, race, sexuality, or institutional cruelty when those forces are actively shaping choices.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene with violence, racism, grief, or moral compromise is rendered in abstract or polite shorthand, revise to restore specific bodily, social, and material consequence before accepting the draft.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high - contractions are the baseline in contemporary Mississippi speech; uncontracted forms are reserved for formality, emphasis, or social performance.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: rotate structural textures across chapters: procedural surge, quiet domestic interval, document-driven slow burn, dread preparation, aftermath inventory, and information-turn chapters; avoid repeating scene count plus dialogue density pattern in adjacent chapters.
prose_style_profile.diction: literary but grounded; precise legal and forensic terms when needed, balanced by lived vernacular and local material detail.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third person anchored primarily to Lena, with brief controlled expansions only when factual clarity requires it.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: alternate compressed procedural sentences with longer sensory-emotional lines so pressure and reflection keep rebalancing.
